subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and the God of all who dwell in the Kingdom of Names, my Sovereign and the Sovereign of earth and heaven! Thou seest and knowest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و اله من فی ملکوت الاسماء و سلطانی و سلطان الارض و السماء تری و تعلم
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @law of fasting
